product_overview: Aadesh AI is a web app that helps Karnataka government caseworkers generate formal legal orders in Kannada by uploading sample files and using AI to draft new orders which can be edited and downloaded as DOCX/PDF. The app includes onboarding, training uploads, credit-based generation, order history, and billing.
core_goals: Enable users to register, authenticate, and access a personalized dashboard.
Allow users to generate high-quality Kannada legal orders from minimal inputs and sample files.
Provide a training pipeline to improve AI output using user-provided documents.
Support secure payments to purchase credits and reflect credit balances accurately.
Ensure bilingual support (English / Kannada) and mobile responsiveness across the app.

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public home page presenting Aadesh AI, language toggle, feature highlights and CTAs directing users to sign up or login.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Kannada hero text and feature cards -> Toggle language to English -> See landing content switch to English -> Navigate to /auth/register
Navigate to / -> See pricing cards with 4 packs -> Attempt to load page with broken image -> See no broken images or console errors

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account with name, email and password and receive an email verification prompt.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/register -> Fill name -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit registration form -> See success message with email verification prompt
Navigate to /auth/register -> Submit empty form -> See validation errors in Kannada -> Correct fields and resubmit

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate existing users via email/password or SSO, handling MFA and errors in Kannada.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See loading spinner during authentication -> Land on /app
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill email -> Fill wrong password -> Submit login form -> See Kannada error message for invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated landing that presents personalized greeting, stats (orders, credits, files), quick actions and training status.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> See personalized time-based greeting and stats cards -> See credits remaining and training status -> Navigate to /app/generate
Navigate to /app while unauthenticated -> Be redirected to /auth/login -> See login form

features.name: Generate Order
features.description: Core flow to create a new Kannada legal order by uploading a case file or entering case details, running AI generation, reviewing guardrails, and downloading DOCX/PDF.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/generate -> Drag and drop case file into upload zone or provide inputs -> Select order type -> Fill case number -> Fill survey number -> Fill village name -> Fill appellant name -> Type case details -> Submit generate request -> Watch progress timer during AI generation -> See generated Kannada order text -> See guardrail validation results -> Check verification to enable downloads -> Navigate to /api/download to retrieve DOCX
Navigate to /app/generate -> Fill inputs -> Be offline or have 0 credits -> Submit generate request -> See offline banner or credit warning and generation is blocked

features.name: AI Training
features.description: Upload multiple sample files to improve the model's drafting style and view multi-stage upload/training progress.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/train -> Drag and drop multiple files into upload zone -> See upload progress with multi-step pipeline display -> See file table with status indicators -> See training status bar update
Navigate to /app/train -> Attempt to upload unsupported file type -> See file type validation error and no file is added

features.name: Billing and Credits
features.description: Purchase credits via Razorpay packs and reflect credit balance updates in the account.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/billing -> View 4 pricing packs with INR prices -> Select a pack -> Complete Razorpay checkout modal -> See success message and credits added to balance
Navigate to /app/billing -> Select a pack -> Fail payment in checkout -> See Kannada error message and credits unchanged

features.name: My Orders
features.description: List and view history of previously generated orders with metadata and download options.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/my-orders -> See list of previously generated orders with case number, date, word count and order type -> Open an order -> Download order as DOCX or PDF
Navigate to /app/my-orders -> Search for a non-existent order -> See no-results state

features.name: File Storage
features.description: Manage uploaded files: upload, list metadata, download and delete files stored in the user's account.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/upload -> Drag and drop files into upload zone -> See file list with metadata and upload progress -> Download an uploaded file -> Delete a file -> Confirm deletion and see file removed
Navigate to /app/upload -> Attempt to delete a file -> Cancel deletion in confirmation dialog -> See file remains in the list

features.name: User Settings
features.description: View and update account information, change password and manage preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /app/user-settings -> View account information -> Update profile settings -> Save changes -> See confirmation of updated profile
Navigate to /app/user-settings -> Attempt to change password with incorrect current password -> See validation error and password not changed

features.name: Language Toggle (EN ↔ ಕನ್ನಡ)
features.description: Global language toggle that switches UI text between English and Kannada and persists selection across navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle language to Kannada -> See landing page content in Kannada -> Navigate to /app/generate -> See input placeholders and labels in Kannada -> Navigate to /app/billing -> See pricing text in Kannada
Navigate to /app/billing -> Toggle language -> Observe no change on billing text (regression) -> See error state that must not occur

routes.description: Landing page with Kannada hero, feature cards, pricing, CTA
Login with email/password, SSO buttons, MFA detection
Dashboard with stats, greeting, quick actions, credit warnings
AI order generation - file upload, form, AI output, download
Upload training files for AI model improvement
Purchase credits via Razorpay, 4 pricing packs

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Public landing page with Kannada text, feature showcase, pricing cards, and CTA buttons

Click Get Started button to navigate to /auth/register
Click Login button to navigate to /auth/login

features.description: Login with email and password, SSO buttons, MFA detection and routing
user_interactions: See Kannada error messages on invalid credentials
Click Sign Up link to register

user_interactions: See success message with email verification prompt

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main dashboard with personalized greeting, stats cards, quick actions
user_interactions: View stats cards (Orders Generated, Credits Remaining, Files Uploaded)
See credit warning when credits equal 0
See first-time user CTA when no orders and no files

features.name: Generate Order
features.description: Core feature - upload case file, fill form, AI generates Kannada order, download DOCX/PDF
user_interactions: Drag and drop case file (DOCX/PDF) into upload zone
Type case details in large textarea
Watch progress timer during AI generation
View word count with color coding
Check verification checkbox to enable downloads

features.name: AI Training
features.description: Upload multiple case files to train AI model on user writing style
user_interactions: Drag and drop multiple files into upload zone
View upload progress with multi-step pipeline display
View file table with status indicators
Click download button on individual file
Click delete button on individual file
View training status bar with file count breakdown
Click link to generate page when 5+ files uploaded

features.name: Billing and Credits
features.description: Purchase order credits via Razorpay with 4 pricing packs
user_interactions: View 4 pricing pack cards with prices in INR
Click Buy button on desired pack
See success message with credits added in Kannada
See error message on failed payment

features.name: My Orders
features.description: View history of all generated orders
user_interactions: View list of previously generated orders
Click on order to view details

features.name: File Storage
features.description: Upload, view, and manage files
user_interactions: Drag and drop files into upload zone

features.name: User Settings
features.description: User account settings and preferences

known_limitations.issue: Payment verification previously missing Authorization header, fixed 2026-03-29
known_limitations.impact: Payment verification could fail without Bearer token

known_limitations.issue: File upload progress is simulated based on file size, not real upload speed
known_limitations.impact: Progress bar may not reflect actual upload progress

known_limitations.issue: Generation cannot proceed when offline, only banner is shown
known_limitations.impact: Users on poor connections see offline banner but cannot queue work
